channel.title: EURUSD News Feed
channel.description: Latest EURUSD headlines from investingLive, ForexLive, ForexCrunch, ActionForex, Investing.com, DailyForex and Trading Economics

item.title: [TradingEconomics] Euro Hovers Near April Lows as Iran War Weighs on Growth
[TradingEconomics] Euro Bounces Back as Middle East Hopes Rise
[Investing.com] Broader energy shock may pressure Europe and lift dollar, Goldman says
[investingLive] What are the bias, risks, and key targets for the EURUSD, USDJPY, and GBPUSD right now?
item.description: As the new trading day gets underway, markets are off to a relatively cautious and choppy start. Oil prices are modestly lower and trading near session lows after giving back an earlier spike higher. U.S. yields are also slightly lower — down around 1 basis point across much of the curve after tradi

item.title: [investingLive] EURUSD bangs against target resistance at 1.1655. Can the buyers get through the target.
item.description: In the morning kickstart video, I commented on the 1.1655 level as a key target. The infograph highlights my key technical comment on that pair (see highlighted yellow are on the infograph below from the start of the trading day):The price did move higher and tested that level in the North American

item.title: [FXStreet] Euro weakens below 1.1650 as Iran uncertainty supports US Dollar
item.description: The EUR/USD pair trades in negative territory around 1.1645 during the early Asian trading hours on Tuesday. The Euro (EUR) softens against the US Dollar (USD) amid persistent uncertainty in the Middle East surrounding Iran.

item.title: [ActionForex] EURUSD Zigzag Correction Points to Elliott Wave Support at 1.148–1.160
item.description: EURUSD is unfolding a corrective zigzag structure from the April 17, 2026 high. First, wave A ended at 1.1655, establishing the initial leg of the decline. Then, wave B rallied to 1.1796, as shown on the one‑hour chart. From that point onward, wave C began to progress lower, subdividing into five sm

item.title: [FXStreet] EUR/USD Price Forecast: 1.1655 acts as key barrier for Euro bulls
item.description: The EUR/USD pair trades 0.18% lower to near 1.1635 during the European trading session on Tuesday. The major currency pair faces selling pressure as the US Dollar (USD) resumes its upside journey amid firm expectations that the Federal Reserve (Fed) will not cut interest rates this year.

item.title: [FXStreet] Euro: Downtrend versus US Dollar intact with key 1.1600 level – UOB
item.description: United Overseas Bank’s (UOB) Quek Ser Leang and Lee Sue Ann report EUR/USD has rebounded from 1.1607 but expects further gains to face strong resistance at 1.1685 in the near term.
